summary_en: Mitsuba Co. (51.31% holder) and Chubu Electric Co. to acquire all remaining RYOMO shares via tender offer at ¥2,700 per share (total ¥9,450M approx.). Post-close ownership: Mitsuba 80%, Chubu Electric 20%. Board recommends tendering. Share delisting expected. Strategic capital partnership agreement with Chubu Electric to be executed.
title_en: Notice of Expression of Support for Tender Offer for Company Shares by Controlling Shareholder Mitsuba Co., Ltd. and Chubu Electric Power Co., Inc., Recommendation to Participate, and Notice of Execution of Capital and Business Partnership Agreement with Chubu Electric Power Co., Inc.
translation_en_brief: On May 14, 2026, RYOMO Systems (TSE Standard, code 9691) announced that its board has approved and recommends shareholder participation in a tender offer for all outstanding ordinary shares not held by Mitsuba Co., Ltd. (51.31% controlling shareholder) and Chubu Electric Power Co., Inc. The two offerors propose an acquisition price of ¥2,700 per share. Upon successful completion and subsequent share cancellations, Mitsuba will hold 80% of voting rights and Chubu Electric will hold 20%. The board has concluded this transaction structure, intended to result in sole remaining shareholders being Mitsuba and Chubu Electric, with delisting of RYOMO shares from the TSE. Concurrently, the company has resolved to execute a capital and business partnership agreement with Chubu Electric.
